title: HIV.Configuration
description: This tab describes data about a facility or region that are used in workflows and decision logic (i.e. WHO recommendations depend upon these data elements), but are not specific to an individual (e.g. a high HIV burden setting)

resourceType.description: Resource type identifier for HIVConfiguration logical model

@context.description: JSON-LD context for this logical model with ValueSet vocabularies

anyOf.description: URI reference to external JSON-LD context

@type.description: JSON-LD type identifier for HIVConfiguration logical model

populationPrevalenceOfTb.description: The tuberculosis prevalence in the general population in number of cases per 100 000 persons or greater.

populationPrevalenceOfSoilTransmittedHel.description: The percentage of individuals in the general population infected with at least one species of soil-transmitted helminths

populationIncidenceOfHivInTheAbsenceOfPr.description: HIV incidence number of cases per 100 person–years in the absence of PrEP

populationPrevalenceOfHiv.description: The proportion of the population that are HIV-positive

prevalenceOfPretreatmentNnrtiDrugResista.description: Prevalence of pretreatment HIV drug resistance to NNRTIs among people initiating first-line ART

malariaEndemicSetting.description: Whether the setting is a malaria-endemic setting

populationPrevalenceOfSyphilis.description: The proportion of the population with syphilis

populationPrevalenceOfHepatitisB.description: The proportion of hepatitis B surface antigen (HBsAg) seroprevalence in the general population

populationPrevalenceOfHepatitisC.description: The proportion of hepatitis C virus (HCV) antibody seroprevalence in the general population

prevalenceOfHivInTheCatchmentArea.description: The proportion of the population from the health facility's catchment area that are HIV-positive (estimated)

ultrasoundAvailableAtTheHealthFacility.description: Whether an ultrasound machine is available and functional in the facility and a trained health worker is available to use it

hivBurdenOfTheSetting.description: HIV burden of the setting (high or low) based on the national HIV prevalence or where the HIV prevalence and/or incidence in a geographical setting is higher than national prevalence and, therefore, needs priority in the HIV response

hpvDnaTestingOperationalAtTheHealthFacil.description: Is HPV DNA testing operational at the health facility for cervical cancer screening?

routineViralLoadTestingIsAvailable.description: Routine viral load testing is available in the facility

healthFacilityId.description: Unique ID of the health facility that recorded the client. This ID could represent a universal health facility ID, if used in the country. Alternatively this ID can also be generated by the national surveillance system and assigned to reporting facility.

tbTreatingFacilityId.description: The facility where the client is receiving tuberculosis (TB) treatment

otherPriorityPopulations.description: Other populations of priority of HIV prevention and care in local context (provided during adaptation)

reportingPeriodEndDate.description: End date of the reporting period

reportingPeriodStartDate.description: Start date of the reporting period

reportingDate.description: Reporting date, for surveys performed on a specific date
